---
id: get-draft-version
title: "Get the App Store draft version"
description: "The draft version is the latest unreleased version—the one that can be submitted for App Store review. If no such version exists, a draft version can be created. - IOS only"
sidebar_label: "Get the App Store draft version"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/release-management/api-reference/release-management-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Gets the App Store draft version"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apple-app-store/app-versions/draft"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



The draft version is the latest unreleased version—the one that can be submitted for App Store review. If no such version exists, a draft version can be created. - IOS only

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
